u with rightwards arrow on top space equals space 3 i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 2 j with rightwards arrow on top comma space v with rightwards arrow on top space equals space minus i with rightwards arrow on top space plus space 4 j with rightwards arrow on top space d a n space r with rightwards arrow on top space equals space 7 i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 8 j with rightwards arrow on top. space J i k a space r with rightwards arrow on top space equals space m u with rightwards arrow on top space plus space n v with rightwards arrow on top
